deep_dive.title: Multimodal Concept Bottleneck Models
deep_dive.abstract: Concept Bottleneck Models (CBMs) enhance the interpretability of deep learning networks by aligning the features extracted from images with natural concepts. However, existing CBMs are constrained in their ability to generalize beyond a fixed set of predefined classes and the risk of non-concept information leakage, where predictive signals outside the intended concepts are inadvertently exploited. In this paper, we propose Multimodal Concept Bottleneck Model (MM-CBM) to address these issues and extend CBMs into CLIP. MM-CBM utilizes dual Concept Bottleneck Layers (CBLs) to align both the image and text embeddings into interpretable features. This allows us to perform new vision tasks like zero-shot classification or image retrieval in an interpretable way. Compared to existing methods, MM-CBM achieves up to 51.26% accuracy improvement on average across four standard benchmarks. Our method maintains high accuracy, staying within ~5% of black-box performance while offering greater interpretability.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: multimodal concept bottleneck model extending CLIP for unified vision-language
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 多模态概念瓶颈模型扩展CLIP，实现统一视觉语言表示
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 多模态概念瓶颈模型扩展CLIP，实现统一视觉语言表示
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 多模态概念瓶颈模型扩展CLIP，实现统一视觉语言表示
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Proposes Multimodal Concept Bottleneck Model (MM-CBM) extending CBMs into CLIP with dual Concept Bottleneck Layers, enabling interpretable zero-shot classification and retrieval across modalities.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对现有概念瓶颈模型泛化性差和概念泄露问题，提出多模态概念瓶颈模型MM-CBM。通过双概念瓶颈层对齐图像和文本嵌入，将可解释性扩展到CLIP模型。实验表明MM-CBM在零样本分类和图像检索等任务上保持可解释性的同时提升了性能，为多模态统一框架提供了新思路。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 针对现有概念瓶颈模型泛化性差和概念泄露问题，提出多模态概念瓶颈模型MM-CBM。通过双概念瓶颈层对齐图像和文本嵌入，将可解释性扩展到CLIP模型。实验表明MM-CBM在零样本分类和图像检索等任务上保持可解释性的同时提升了性能，为多模态统一框架提供了新思路。

quick_skim.title: RepFusion: Leveraging Multimodal Priors for Denoising in Representation Space
quick_skim.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are widely used in text-to-image (T2I) systems, but they are typically limited to text encoding, while denoising is handled by newly trained generative backbones. The emergence of representation autoencoders (RAEs) shifts the generation target toward semantically structured visual representations, creating a latent space that is more compatible with pretrained LLM priors. Inspired by multimodal LLMs (MLLMs), where an MLP projector is sufficient to align clean visual representations with a pretrained LLM, we repurpose the MLLM itself as a noisy representation encoder, extending this mechanism from clean to noisy inputs. We present RepFusion, which uses the resulting MLLM outputs as the conditioning signal for a diffusion transformer. In controlled comparisons at similar inference budgets, RepFusion outperforms baselines that devote comparable capacity to newly initialized denoisers. These results demonstrate that MLLMs provide strong priors for denoising visual representations and that, by conditioning on evolving noisy representations, test-time compute can be productively spent on repeated MLLM conditioning in modern T2I systems.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: multimodal priors for denoising in representation space using MLLM
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 利用多模态先验在表示空间去噪，采用MLLM
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 利用多模态先验在表示空间去噪，采用MLLM
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 利用多模态先验在表示空间去噪，采用MLLM
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: RepFusion repurposes MLLM as noisy representation encoder to leverage multimodal priors for diffusion denoising, enabling text-to-image generation with pretrained LLM compatibility.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 文本到图像生成中，通常仅用大语言模型编码文本，去噪由生成骨干处理。本文利用表示自编码器与多模态大模型的对齐能力，将MLLM改造为噪声表示编码器，使其输出作为扩散条件。RepFusion通过多模态先验指导去噪，在保持生成质量的同时实现了与预训练大语言模型的更好兼容，为融合语言与视觉生成提供了新范式。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 文本到图像生成中，通常仅用大语言模型编码文本，去噪由生成骨干处理。本文利用表示自编码器与多模态大模型的对齐能力，将MLLM改造为噪声表示编码器，使其输出作为扩散条件。RepFusion通过多模态先验指导去噪，在保持生成质量的同时实现了与预训练大语言模型的更好兼容，为融合语言与视觉生成提供了新范式。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: Papers central to 统一多模态相关论文，也可以包括理解、生成、编辑, especially work that connects or combines: unified multimodal model architectures and frameworks; transformer models for multimodal data fusion; Unified Multimodal.
